scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,focus,math,lang,sensory -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:focus" "npm run dev:math" "npm run dev:language" "npm run dev:sensory"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix focus_module && npm run build --prefix math_module && npm run build --prefix langauge_module && npm run build --prefix sensory_module
